goal: function_eq_on[Domain, Value](domain, left, right) = forall(x0: Domain) { domain.contains(x0) implies left(x0) = right(x0) }
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } = function_eq_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, left, right)
function_eq_on[Domain, Value](domain, left, right)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or left(x0) = right(x0) } = true)
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and left(x0) != right(x0)) }(point)
function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } = function_eq_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, left, right)
function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } = function_eq_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, right, left)
function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } = function_eq_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, f, h)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ domain and f(w0) != h(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or h(x0) = f(x0) }(w0)

goal: function_lte_on[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper) = forall(x0: Domain) { domain.contains(x0) implies lower(x0) <= upper(x0) }
proof: function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2(x3) } = function_lte_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper)
function_lte_on[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or lower(x0) <= upper(x0) } = true)
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not lower(x0) <= upper(x0)) }(point)

goal: function_lt_on[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper) = forall(x0: Domain) { domain.contains(x0) implies lower(x0) < upper(x0) }
proof: function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) < x2(x3) } = function_lt_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper)
function_lt_on[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or lower(x0) < upper(x0) } = true)
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not lower(x0) < upper(x0)) }(point)
function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2(x3) } = function_lte_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, f, f)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ domain and not f(w0) <= f(w0) }
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or x0 <= x1 }[Value](f(w0), f(w0))

function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2(x3) } = function_lte_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, left, right)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ domain and not left(w0) <= right(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or left(x0) <= right(x0) }(w0)

let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ domain and not f(w0) <= h(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) <= h(x0) }(w0)
function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } = function_eq_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, left, right)

function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or right(x0) = left(x0) }(w0)

function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) <= h(x0) }(w0)

function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) <= h(x0) }(w0)
function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) < x2(x3) } = function_lt_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, f, h)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ domain and not f(w0) < h(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) < h(x0) }(w0)

function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2(x3) } = function_lte_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, lower, upper)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ domain and not lower(w0) <= upper(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or lower(x0) <= upper(x0) }(w0)

goal: subset.subset(superset) = forall(x0: Domain) { subset.contains(x0) implies superset.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Domain](subset, superset)
subset ⊂ superset
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ subset or x0 ∈ superset } = true)
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ subset and not x0 ∈ superset) }(point)

function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2(x3) } = function_lte_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](subset, lower, upper)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ subset and not lower(w0) <= upper(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ subset or lower(x0) <= upper(x0) }(w0)

proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Domain](subset, superset)
subset ⊂ superset
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ subset or x0 ∈ superset } = true)
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ subset and not x0 ∈ superset) }(point)
function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) < x2(x3) } = function_lt_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](subset, lower, upper)
let w0: Domain satisfy { w0 ∈ subset and not lower(w0) < upper(w0) }
function(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ subset or lower(x0) < upper(x0) }(w0)
